description: CompositionGrey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding printed on the chest and left sleeveFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGerman brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This T-shirt is the kind you can't have enough of, the crush-worthy colour and stylish cut make it an off-duty must have. Pair this piece with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
